name: Monster Tavern
short_description: A Roguelite Deckbuilder where drinks are your weapons and monsters are your guests. Draft your deck, build powerful combos, and try to survive three chaotic weeks behind the bar.
detailed_description:
Monster Tavern is a strategic deckbuilder where you run a dangerous monster bar, serving creatures fresh off a day of harassing heroes and wreaking havoc. When night falls weary monsters crowd into the tavern looking to drink, gripe, and unwind. Your task is to manage the chaos through smart card play, keeping patrons satisfied and the bar standing as each night grows more unruly.

Each shift is a turned-based puzzle where Monsters constantly threaten to destroy the bar. Serve drinks, perform actions, and use the tools at your disposal to manage them and prevent things from getting out of hand. Between shifts draft new drinks, refine your deck, and gain powerful trinkets to face the next challenge.

Replayability is at the heart of Monster Tavern. Every run is its own opportunity to find unique ways of building your catalog of Drinks and Actions. Along the way complete goals to unlock new starter trinkets that change the way you tackle each run, making every playthrough a fresh, unpredictable experience. Once you've mastered the base game, increase the pressure by raising your reputation level, adding stacking enhancements to the monsters who enter your bar. See how you compare against your friends on Steam.

Keep the ale flowing… and the tavern standing.

reviews.review_text:
Very addicting, tactical combat, lovely art style and music. As an experienced card game player you'll get at least 5-6 hours of fun out of it.

 I'm looking forward to more content and to see how the game will improve over time <3

A lot of fun, with unexpected turns and difficulty. The game's quirky humor and characters really create an engaging, entertaining atmosphere. You can tell the dev had a blast creating this game. The progression of monster characters with each passing round/day is a delightful surprise and the bosses had me actually laughing out loud. Awesome game, can't wait to see where it goes from here! You can tell a lot of love went into this, it's full of personality and charm. Highly recommend!

After playing a lot of other deck builders, I can say Monster Tavern is a unique and fun spin on the formula. The art and sound design is charming and feels comfy, yet engaging to play. I'm hooked and can't wait to play more! 

Came for the bartending, stayed for them sumptuous Valley Girls. 10/10

This is a very charming little game with an original concept. I found it fairly challenging, if you like card based games like Slay the Spire you will likely enjoy this title. You run a bar and monsters are your patrons, its a very cozy game.
Fun, original deckbuilder with charming art and sounds. Looking forward to the full release!
